name: Juliana Jendo
description: '''Juliana Jendo''' ([[Syriac language|Syriac]]: ܓܘܠܝܢܐ ܓܢܕܐ; born November 30, 1956, in [[Tel Tamer]], [[Syria]]) is a [[Syria|Syrian]] [[Assyrian people|Assyrian]] singer and actress who, unlike many other [[Assyrian Neo-Aramaic]]-speaking artists, has occasionally recorded songs in [[Turoyo language|Surayt/Turoyo]] and [[Arabic]]. She has mostly recorded folk dance music.
